title: potentilla stenotoma
intro: Potentilla stenotoma, also known as Five-Leaf Potentilla, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family, known for its unique five-lobed leaves and clusters of small white or pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Potentilla stenotoma include its ability to reduce swelling, promote wound healing, and act as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. Potentilla stenotoma can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
